title: Verify homepage widget visibility on Day 0 and Day 1 of trial
description: Test that the persistent, high-visibility widget is displayed on the homepage for a user on Day 0 and Day 1 of their trial.
preconditions: User is in the Trial Corner cohort
User's trial is on Day 0 or Day 1

steps.description: 1. Log in as an eligible trial user on Day 0.
4. Refresh the homepage and observe the header.

expected_result: A persistent widget with the text "Trial Mode: X Days Remaining. Manage Control Center →" and a shield/clock icon is visible on both days.
